title: Google Flow Guide 2026: AI Video & Automation for Small Business
author: Damian Kemper
description: What is Google Flow? Learn how to use Google’s new unified AI studio for cinematic video generation and automated business workflows.
content:
What is Google Flow?

Google Flow is a new AI-powered development platform designed around autonomous AI agents that can plan, execute, and validate tasks with minimal human input.

Instead of simply assisting with tasks (like traditional AI tools), Flow allows businesses to delegate entire workflows to AI.

10 Practical AI Automation Use Cases for Small Businesses

  • AI Appointment Scheduling
  • Lead Qualification & Routing
  • Automated Customer Support
  • Website Chat → CRM → Follow-Up Automation
  • AI Content & Blog Generation

Learn more about how Google Flow is transforming AI automation for small businesses in our full guide.
